query:
UPDATE users 
SET 
  dailyBillingEnabled = 1,
  billingStartAt = COALESCE(billingStartAt, DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-01')),
  billingStatus = 'active',
  updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE 
  role IN ('client', 'reseller')
  AND id IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT ownerId FROM nas WHERE ownerId IS NOT NULL
  )
  AND (dailyBillingEnabled = 0 OR billingStartAt IS NULL);

SELECT u.id, u.username, u.role, u.dailyBillingEnabled, u.billingStartAt, u.billingStatus, 
       (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM nas WHERE ownerId = u.id) as nas_count,
       w.balance
FROM users u 
LEFT JOIN wallets w ON w.userId = u.id
WHERE u.role IN ('client', 'reseller')
ORDER BY u.id;
